codeReview.summary: Clean, well-structured polish pass. Created `drawing::palette` module with 13 named color constants forming a cohesive dark blue-grey theme. All inline Color::rgb/rgba calls in the compositor were replaced with palette references (zero remaining). TEXT_INSET_TOP/BOTTOM were corrected to account for chrome height + shadow + 8px minimum margin (52px top, 44px bottom). Chrome text in title bar and status bar is now vertically centered using `(bar_height - line_height) / 2`. Line height is 1.25x font size (20px for 16px font), meeting the >= 1.2x requirement. Content surface extends full-screen with zero margins, eliminating any gap possibilities between chrome and content. The SHADOW_ALPHA_MAX constant was correctly removed since its value is now embedded in SHADOW_PEAK. All 847 tests pass (826 system + 21 prototype), well above the 607 regression gate. No new tests needed — this is purely compile-time constants and layout arithmetic. Visual verification was performed at both 1024x768 and 1920x1080 resolutions, plus image viewer mode.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The palette module uses `include!()` macro pattern (palette.rs included into lib.rs) consistent with existing files (font_data.rs, gamma_tables.rs, png.rs, etc.), so palette constants are exported at the `drawing::` namespace level. This is the established pattern but isn't documented in AGENTS.md — if a future worker needs to add a new module to the drawing library, they'd need to discover this pattern by reading lib.rs.

AGENTS.md documents test baseline as '719+ tests' but actual test count is now 847 (826 system + 21 prototype). The baseline number should be updated to reflect the current state so future features use an accurate regression gate.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md says '719+ tests must pass at all times (698 system + 21 prototype)' but handoff reports 847 total tests passing.

summary: Pass. The polish-pass feature fully meets all 6 goals: (1) 13 named color constants centralized in drawing::palette, (2) cohesive dark blue-grey theme with harmonious chrome/text/accent colors, (3) line height 1.25x >= 1.2x requirement, (4) minimum margins >= 8px (52px top, 44px bottom, 12px sides), (5) no surface boundary gaps due to full-screen content surface, (6) 847 tests pass with 0 failures. Implementation is minimal and focused — 99 lines added, 46 removed across 3 files. No bugs or edge cases identified.
